summary: UX/Accessibility audit: 9 findings (3 HIGH, 4 MEDIUM, 2 LOW). Touch target violations in gameplay-critical paths. Font size below 11px in compact mode. Hardcoded i18n strings.

findings.description: Biome selection button height 36px < MIN_TOUCH_TARGET(48). Core gameplay navigation path.
findings.rule: WCAG touch target 44px minimum, studio constant MIN_TOUCH_TARGET=48

findings.description: Ogham selection button height 30px < MIN_TOUCH_TARGET(48). Critical pre-run selection.
Base minigame button 100x36px < MIN_TOUCH_TARGET. Affects all 8 champs lexicaux minigames during gameplay.
small_font_size = 10 in compact_mode (mobile). Studio rule: no text < 11px.
Collection tab buttons: 32px compact / 38px normal — both < MIN_TOUCH_TARGET(48).
5 hardcoded French strings (Collection, Gloire, Rang, Passe de Gloire, Fins & Runes) not using I18nRegistry.
findings.rule: cycle_instructions.md i18n section: never hardcode French in code

findings.description: 6 hardcoded French strings (PARTIR EN AVENTURE, Memoires, Fermer, Vies Passees) not using I18nRegistry.

invariants_passed: EndRunScreen continue button correctly uses 48px height
